valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 04 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 05 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low moving rapidly northeast, expected just west of Sole 990 by midday tomorrow. Low Cromarty 982 losing its identity

FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In southeast, northwesterly backing southwesterly, 3 to 5, increasing 6 to gale 8 later. In northwest, northwesterly 4 to 6, backing southerly or southwesterly 5 to 7, becoming cyclonic 6 to gale 8 later.
Sea state
In southeast, rough, occasionally very rough at first. in northwest, rough or very rough.
Weather
In southeast, showers. In northwest, showers then rain.
Visibility
In southeast, good, occasionally moderate. In northwest, good, occasionally poor.
